name: quality-documentation-manager
description: Document control system for medical device QMS covering document numbering, version control, ISO 13485 §4.2.4 and FDA 21 CFR 820.40 compliance.
review: Strongest technical entry in the alirezarezvani QMS suite. Working document_validator.py CLI with proper OOP, rule codes, severity weighting — professionally written. Best documentation in the suite (12 triggers, full TOC, validation checkpoints, sample JSON). Covers mandatory high-stakes regulatory domain (ISO 13485 §4.2.4, FDA 21 CFR 820.40, Part 11). Zero security concerns — pure stdlib Python, no network calls.
